blank_possible.issue: Page renders blank if selectedProduct is null/undefined without user interaction
blank_possible.impact: User navigates to product page but product fails to load (API error, missing ID)

blank_possible.issue: Page renders blank if selectedOrder is null/undefined
blank_possible.impact: User tries to track single order but selectedOrder state not set

blank_possible.issue: Initial render depends on selectedOrder state initialization
blank_possible.impact: If selectedOrder is not properly initialized to null, logic could fail

blank_possible.issue: Dashboard shows blank if loading is true OR profile is undefined OR profile.approved is false
blank_possible.impact: Three possible blank states: loading state, profile undefined, unapproved account

blank_possible.issue: Pickup page shows blank if profile is undefined or not approved
blank_possible.impact: Delivery partner sees blank page if account not yet approved by admin

blank_possible.issue: Delivery page shows blank if profile is undefined or not approved
blank_possible.impact: Delivery partner sees blank page if profile not loaded or not approved

blank_possible.issue: History page shows blank if profile is undefined or not approved
blank_possible.impact: Delivery partner sees blank page during profile loading

blank_possible.issue: Profile page shows blank if profile is null/undefined
blank_possible.impact: Profile page doesn't show loading state, just blank

issues: ProductDetailPage render depends on selectedProduct being truthy - could show blank page if product fetch fails but page state changes

DeliveryApp.jsx.special_structure: Uses inline JSX within divs instead of separate component functions
issues: Dashboard page condition: `page === 'dashboard' && !loading && profile?.approved` - renders blank during loading or if profile undefined
Pickup/Delivery/History pages: condition checks `profile?.approved` - shows blank if profile undefined or not approved
Profile page: condition checks `profile &&` - shows blank if profile undefined, no loading indicator
All page conditions use optional chaining (?.) but don't have fallback loading states for most pages
OrderCard is defined as const but works correctly since it's JavaScript

recommendations: DeliveryApp: Add loading state displays for dashboard and profile pages instead of showing blank
DeliveryApp: Consider showing 'Pending Approval' message on all pages if profile not approved, similar to existing approval guard
CustomerApp: Consider adding loading states for ProductDetailPage and TrackSingleOrderPage renders to prevent blank pages
All apps: Ensure API calls have proper error handling and don't leave pages in blank state
